2026-04-07T02:57:32.2285942Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m

2026-04-07T02:58:30.5682997Z

Be specific about what data is needed.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"Explanation of why this data is needed to complete the task (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":[],"type":"object"},"name":"missing_data"},{"description":"Signal that the task could not be completed due to an infrastructure or tool failure (e.g., MCP server crash, missing authentication, inaccessible repository). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. The temporary ID is returned in the tool response so you can reference this comment later.","pattern":"^aw_[A-Za-z0-9]{3,12}$","type":"string"}},"required":["body"],"type":"object"},"name":"add_comment"},{"description":"Add labels to an existing GitHub issue or pull request for categorization and filtering. Labels must already exist in the repository. For creating new issues with labels, use create_issue with the labels property instead. CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 7 label(s) can be added. Target: *.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"item_number":{"description":"Issue or PR number to add labels to. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 456 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/456). If omitted, adds labels to the item that triggered this workflow.","type":"number"},"labels":{"description":"Label names to add (e.g., ['bug', 'priority-high']). Labels must exist in the repository. This field is required — omitting it will cause a validation error.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":["labels"],"type":"object"},"name":"add_labels"},{"description":"Remove labels from an existing GitHub issue or pull request. If a label is not present on the item, it will be silently skipped. Use this to clean up labels that are no longer applicable. CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 7 label(s) can be removed. Target: *.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"item_number":{"description":"Issue or PR number to remove labels from. If omitted, removes labels from the item that triggered this workflow.","type":"number"},"labels":{"description":"Label names to remove (e.g., ['bug', 'needs-triage']). Labels that don't exist on the item are silently skipped. At least one label must be provided.","items":{"type":"string"},"minItems":1,"type":"array"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":["labels"],"type":"object"},"name":"remove_labels"},{"description":"Assign one or more GitHub users to an issue. Use this when you cannot accomplish what was requested because the required functionality is missing or access is restricted.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"alternatives":{"description":"Any workarounds, manual steps, or alternative approaches the user could take (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"Explanation of why this tool is needed or what information you want to share about the limitation (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"tool":{"description":"Optional: Name or description of the missing tool or capability (max 128 characters). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"message":{"description":"Status or completion message to log. Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. All other resource types have corresponding `Sample_*.cs` files, but these are missing:\\n  - `Sample_GuardrailsAvailableVersionCollection.cs` / `Sample_GuardrailsAvailableVersionResource.cs`\\n  - `Sample_ManagedClusterIdentityBindingCollection.cs` / `Sample_ManagedClusterIdentityBindingResource.cs`\\n  - `Sample_ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorCollection.cs` / `Sample_ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorResource.cs`\\n  - `Sample_ManagedClusterLoadBalancerCollection.cs` / `Sample_ManagedClusterLoadBalancerResource.cs`\\n  - `Sample_MeshMembershipCollection.cs` / `Sample_MeshMembershipResource.cs`\\n  - `Sample_ManagedClusterSnapshotCollection.cs` / `Sample_ManagedClusterSnapshotResource.cs`\\n- **CHANGELOG is incomplete:** The `1.5.0-beta.1` entry only states \\u0026#34;Upgraded api-version to 2026-01-02-preview\\u0026#34; but does not enumerate the newly available resource types and operations.\\n- **README Examples section lacks inline samples:** The README\\u0026#39;s \\u0026#34;Examples\\u0026#34; section points to a generic link (`(aka.ms/redacted) with no concrete, library-specific code snippets showing common operations such as creating a managed cluster, listing agent pools, or using the new snapshot/identity-binding/load-balancer resources.\\n- **README Key concepts section is missing resource inventory:** The \\u0026#34;Key concepts\\u0026#34; section only links to generic SDK documentation and does not list the primary resource types exposed by this library (ManagedCluster, AgentPool, MaintenanceConfiguration, etc., including the new additions).\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File 1:** `sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/CHANGELOG.md` — **edit**\\n\\nReplace the `1.5.0-beta.1` entry content with an expanded list of new features:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## 1.5.0-beta.1 (2026-04-03)\\n\\n### Features Added\\n\\n- Upgraded api-version to `2026-01-02-preview`.\\n- Added `GuardrailsAvailableVersionResource` and `GuardrailsAvailableVersionCollection` for managing Guardrails available versions on a managed cluster.\\n- Added `ManagedClusterIdentityBindingResource` and `ManagedClusterIdentityBindingCollection` for managing identity bindings associated with a managed cluster.\\n- Added `ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorResource` and `ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorCollection` for managing JWT authenticators on a managed cluster.\\n- Added `ManagedClusterLoadBalancerResource` and `ManagedClusterLoadBalancerCollection` for managing load balancers associated with a managed cluster.\\n- Added `ManagedClusterMeshMembershipResource` and `ManagedClusterMeshMembershipCollection` for managing service mesh memberships on a managed cluster.\\n- Added `ManagedClusterSnapshotResource` and `ManagedClusterSnapshotCollection` for creating and managing snapshots of managed clusters.\\n```\\n\\n**File 2:** `sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/README.md` — **edit**\\n\\nReplace the current \\u0026#34;Key concepts\\u0026#34; and \\u0026#34;Examples\\u0026#34; sections with enriched content:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n\\n### Resource types\\n\\nThe primary resource types exposed by this library are:\\n\\n| Resource type | Description |\\n|---|---|\\n| `ContainerServiceManagedClusterResource` | Represents an AKS managed Kubernetes cluster |\\n| `ContainerServiceAgentPoolResource` | Represents a node pool within a managed cluster |\\n| `ContainerServiceMaintenanceConfigurationResource` | Scheduled maintenance windows for a cluster |\\n| `ContainerServiceMachineResource` | Individual virtual machine backing an agent pool node |\\n| `ManagedClusterSnapshotResource` | A point-in-time snapshot of a managed cluster configuration |\\n| `ManagedClusterLoadBalancerResource` | Load balancer configuration attached to a managed cluster |\\n| `ManagedClusterIdentityBindingResource` | Identity binding associated with a managed cluster |\\n| `ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorResource` | JWT authenticator configuration for a managed cluster |\\n| `ManagedClusterMeshMembershipResource` | Service mesh membership for a managed cluster |\\n| `GuardrailsAvailableVersionResource` | Available guardrails versions for a subscription/location |\\n| `ContainerServiceTrustedAccessRoleBindingResource` | Trusted access role binding for a managed cluster |\\n\\n## Examples\\n\\nThe following examples show common scenarios. For more complete samples, see the [.NET Management Library Code Samples]((aka.ms/redacted)\\n\\n### Create a managed cluster\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### List agent pools in a cluster\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Create a managed cluster snapshot\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate the following test-backed snippet file:\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/tests/Samples/Sample_ManagedClusterSnapshot.cs` — **create**\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Core.TestFramework;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample_ManagedClusterSnapshot : SamplesBase\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task CreateManagedCluster()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:CreateManagedCluster\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterCollection clusters = resourceGroup.GetContainerServiceManagedClusters();\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterData data = new ContainerServiceManagedClusterData(AzureLocation.EastUS)\\n            {\\n                DnsPrefix = \\u0026#34;myaks\\u0026#34;,\\n                AgentPoolProfiles =\\n                {\\n                    new ManagedClusterAgentPoolProfile(\\u0026#34;nodepool1\\u0026#34;)\\n                    {\\n                        Count = 1,\\n                        VmSize = \\u0026#34;Standard_D2s_v3\\u0026#34;,\\n                        OSType = ContainerServiceOSType.Linux,\\n                        Mode = AgentPoolMode.System,\\n                    }\\n                }\\n            };\\n            ArmOperation operation =\\n                await clusters.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;myAKSCluster\\u0026#34;, data);\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterResource cluster = operation.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Provisioned cluster: {cluster.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task ListAgentPools()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ListAgentPools\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterResource cluster = await resourceGroup\\n                .GetContainerServiceManagedClusters()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myAKSCluster\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            await foreach (ContainerServiceAgentPoolResource pool in cluster.GetContainerServiceAgentPools())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Agent pool: {pool.Data.Name}, count: {pool.Data.Count}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task CreateManagedClusterSnapshot()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:CreateManagedClusterSnapshot\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            ManagedClusterSnapshotCollection snapshots = resourceGroup.GetManagedClusterSnapshots();\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterResource cluster = await resourceGroup\\n                .GetContainerServiceManagedClusters()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myAKSCluster\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            ManagedClusterSnapshotData snapshotData = new ManagedClusterSnapshotData(AzureLocation.EastUS)\\n            {\\n                CreationData = new ContainerServiceCreationData(cluster.Id)\\n            };\\n            ArmOperation snapshotOperation =\\n                await snapshots.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;mySnapshot\\u0026#34;, snapshotData);\\n            ManagedClusterSnapshotResource snapshot = snapshotOperation.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created snapshot: {snapshot.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nThe three snippet names (`CreateManagedCluster`, `ListAgentPools`, `CreateManagedClusterSnapshot`) must match the placeholders added in the README above.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/README.md` currently has all six required sections but the following are incomplete:\\n\\n- **Key concepts** — replace generic text with resource inventory table (see Step 1 above)\\n- **Examples** — replace generic link with inline snippet placeholders (see Step 1 above)\\n\\nAll other sections (Getting started, Troubleshooting, Next and \\u0026#34;Examples\\u0026#34; sections with enriched content:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n\\n### Resource types\\n\\nThe primary resource types exposed by this library are:\\n\\n| Resource type | Description |\\n|---|---|\\n| `ContainerServiceManagedClusterResource` | Represents an AKS managed Kubernetes cluster |\\n| `ContainerServiceAgentPoolResource` | Represents a node pool within a managed cluster |\\n| `ContainerServiceMaintenanceConfigurationResource` | Scheduled maintenance windows for a cluster |\\n| `ContainerServiceMachineResource` | Individual virtual machine backing an agent pool node |\\n| `ManagedClusterSnapshotResource` | A point-in-time snapshot of a managed cluster configuration |\\n| `ManagedClusterLoadBalancerResource` | Load balancer configuration attached to a managed cluster |\\n| `ManagedClusterIdentityBindingResource` | Identity binding associated with a managed cluster |\\n| `ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorResource` | JWT authenticator configuration for a managed cluster |\\n| `ManagedClusterMeshMembershipResource` | Service mesh membership for a managed cluster |\\n| `GuardrailsAvailableVersionResource` | Available guardrails versions for a subscription/location |\\n| `ContainerServiceTrustedAccessRoleBindingResource` | Trusted access role binding for a managed cluster |\\n\\n## Examples\\n\\nThe following examples show common scenarios. For more complete samples, see the [.NET Management Library Code Samples]((aka.ms/redacted)\\n\\n### Create a managed cluster\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### List agent pools in a cluster\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Create a managed cluster snapshot\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate the following test-backed snippet file:\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/tests/Samples/Sample_ManagedClusterSnapshot.cs` — **create**\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Core.TestFramework;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample_ManagedClusterSnapshot : SamplesBase\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task CreateManagedCluster()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:CreateManagedCluster\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterCollection clusters = resourceGroup.GetContainerServiceManagedClusters();\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterData data = new ContainerServiceManagedClusterData(AzureLocation.EastUS)\\n            {\\n                DnsPrefix = \\u0026#34;myaks\\u0026#34;,\\n                AgentPoolProfiles =\\n                {\\n                    new ManagedClusterAgentPoolProfile(\\u0026#34;nodepool1\\u0026#34;)\\n                    {\\n                        Count = 1,\\n                        VmSize = \\u0026#34;Standard_D2s_v3\\u0026#34;,\\n                        OSType = ContainerServiceOSType.Linux,\\n                        Mode = AgentPoolMode.System,\\n                    }\\n                }\\n            };\\n            ArmOperation operation =\\n                await clusters.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;myAKSCluster\\u0026#34;, data);\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterResource cluster = operation.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Provisioned cluster: {cluster.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task ListAgentPools()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ListAgentPools\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterResource cluster = await resourceGroup\\n                .GetContainerServiceManagedClusters()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myAKSCluster\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            await foreach (ContainerServiceAgentPoolResource pool in cluster.GetContainerServiceAgentPools())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Agent pool: {pool.Data.Name}, count: {pool.Data.Count}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task CreateManagedClusterSnapshot()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:CreateManagedClusterSnapshot\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            ManagedClusterSnapshotCollection snapshots = resourceGroup.GetManagedClusterSnapshots();\\n            ContainerServiceManagedClusterResource cluster = await resourceGroup\\n                .GetContainerServiceManagedClusters()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myAKSCluster\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            ManagedClusterSnapshotData snapshotData = new ManagedClusterSnapshotData(AzureLocation.EastUS)\\n            {\\n                CreationData = new ContainerServiceCreationData(cluster.Id)\\n            };\\n            ArmOperation snapshotOperation =\\n                await snapshots.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;mySnapshot\\u0026#34;, snapshotData);\\n            ManagedClusterSnapshotResource snapshot = snapshotOperation.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created snapshot: {snapshot.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nThe three snippet names (`CreateManagedCluster`, `ListAgentPools`, `CreateManagedClusterSnapshot`) must match the placeholders added in the README above.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/README.md` currently has all six required sections but the following are incomplete:\\n\\n- **Key concepts** — replace generic text with resource inventory table (see Step 1 above)\\n- **Examples** — replace generic link with inline snippet placeholders (see Step 1 above)\\n\\nAll other sections (Getting started, Troubleshooting, Next steps, Contributing) are present and acceptable.\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 containerservice` — injects snippet code from test file into README placeholders; confirm README diff looks correct\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 containerservice` — not required (no new public types added by documentation changes)\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/containerservice/Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService/`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt; [!TIP]\\n\\u0026gt; **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`**
